2016-T1-P2-S2.trunk: S+V(states 引语) + 另一句(is to deny…)：宪章声明「…」；其主要执行手段是拒绝…进入哥本哈根
structure: 主句①：The newly revised Danish Fashion Ethical Charter clearly states: 「…」
引语：We are aware of and take responsibility for the impact the fashion industry has on body ideals, especially on young people
├ 并列谓语：are aware of / take responsibility for（共享宾语 the impact）
└ 定语从句〔省略 that，修饰 impact〕：the fashion industry has on body ideals
主句②：The charter's main tool of enforcement is to deny access for designers and modeling agencies to Copenhagen
└ 不定式作表语：to deny access for … to Copenhagen
2016-T1-P2-S2.logic: 主句① states 引语；引语并列谓语 are aware of and take responsibility for + the impact（(that) the fashion industry has on… 定语从句修饰 impact）；句② is to deny…（不定式作表语）。
notes: are aware of and take responsibility for the impact：并列谓语共享宾语 the impact。
the impact (that) the fashion industry has on body ideals：impact 后省略关系词的定语从句。
本条含两句；is to deny access… 不定式作表语（deny access to 拒绝…进入）。

2016-T1-P1-S8.trunk: S+V+间宾+宾语从句：It tells the fashion industry that …（它告诉时尚业，它必须…负责）
structure: 主句：It tells the fashion industry that …
└ 宾语从句(that)：it must take responsibility for the signal …
└ 定语从句〔省略，修饰 signal〕：it sends women … about the social tape-measure
└ 定语从句〔省略，修饰 tape-measure〕：they must use to determine their individual worth
└ 不定式作目的：to determine their individual worth
2016-T1-P1-S8.logic: tell sb that… 结构；宾语从句 take responsibility for the signal；(that) it sends women about… 定语从句修饰 signal；(that) they must use 定语从句修饰 tape-measure；to determine… 目的。
notes: that 引导 tells 的宾语从句（tell sb that…）。
the signal (that) it sends women about…：signal 后省略关系词的定语从句（send sb sth）。
the social tape-measure (that) they must use to determine…：再一层省略关系词的定语从句 + to determine 目的（衡量自身价值的社会标尺）。

2016-T1-P1-S14.trunk: S+V+O(不定式)：it is trying to set voluntary standards for models and fashion images …（它正试图为模特与时尚形象设定自愿标准）
structure: 状语：In Denmark, the United States, and a few other countries
主句：it is trying to set voluntary standard for models and fashion images
└ 定语从句〔that，修饰 models and fashion images〕：that rely more on peer pressure for enforcement
2016-T1-P1-S14.logic: 主句 try to do（试图设定自愿标准）；that 定语从句（rely 用复数，按一致应修饰 models and fashion images；语义上亦可指 standards——存疑）。
notes: that rely more on peer pressure for enforcement：rely 为复数，按主谓一致修饰 models and fashion images；语义上也可理解为修饰 standards（存疑）。rely on … for … 靠…来…。
（standard 此处宜为 standards 复数）。
